commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

commit.message:
Report: comprehensive audit, fix all discrepancies, clean compilation

- Fix 10 content errors found by cross-referencing actual N=2500 results:
  - Feature category counts: Statistical=17, Event=5, Cross=3 (were 13/7/5)
  - n_estimators best=200 (was 300)
  - Awakenings mean=2.44 (was 2.91); healthy efficiency=68.6% (was 68.2%)
  - KS temperature: D=0.064, p<0.001 (was D=0.044, p=0.024)
  - All Ridge per-target R² values corrected from baseline_comparison.json
  - Ridge outperforms RF for awakenings noted (+0.014)
- Replace wrong porcheret2015 citation (PTSD paper) with gooley2011
  (Gooley et al. 2011 — light/melatonin suppression, correct reference)
- Fix temperature equation: two explicit sin() terms (no more \text{saw})
- Add dataset statistics table (Table 2) with mean/std/min/max for labels
- Fix all Overfull hbox warnings: split temperature eq, simplify ablation table
- Zero errors, zero overfull warnings; 6-page clean PDF

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Synthetic Sleep Environment Dataset Generator — TECHIN 513 Final Project Team 7

commit.message:
Add disk cache to coordinator for fast startup and API resilience

- On first refresh, loads cached data from disk immediately so entities
  have data before the first Notion API call completes
- After each successful fetch, writes data to a per-database JSON cache
  file in the HA config directory
- If a live fetch fails and cached data exists, returns stale cache
  instead of raising UpdateFailed (resilient to temporary API outages)

v0.61.2/fix: Tauri demo login — device token endpoint for native app (#640)

## Summary

- **Backend**: Add `POST /api/v1/device/demo-token` — creates demo user
and returns device tokens directly, bypassing the session-based
`/auth/demo` flow that doesn't work in Tauri WebViews
- **Frontend**: In Tauri mode, demo button calls the new API via axios,
stores tokens in `tauri-plugin-store`, and navigates via SPA router

## Test plan

- [ ] `just tauri-ios-sim` → tap demo button → should log in and
navigate to `/thoughts`
- [ ] Web demo login unchanged (`<a href="/auth/demo">` still used for
non-Tauri)

- [ ] Frontend: tsc, biome, build all pass

commit.message:
feat(agent): scaffold autonomous-engineer-v2 preflight, ledger, tool-runner, patch & policy gates (#19067)

### Motivation
- Provide a minimal winning slice for a CI-native autonomous engineering
lane that enforces a preflight plan, deterministic evidence artifacts,
policy gates, and replayable/testable runs.
- Establish machine-verifiable artifact contracts and deny-by-default
safety gates so agent-driven edits can be policy-checked and audited
before merge.
- Create a sandbox-first, default-off scaffold to accelerate subsequent
PRs that implement orchestration, patch application, and eval/drift
monitoring.

### Description
- Added a preflight `RunPlan` schema and validator in `agents/preflight`
and a `run_plan` JSON schema under `artifacts/schemas` to require
planning prior to runs.
- Implemented a persistent `ExecutionLedger` and disk writer under
`agents/ledger` and added an `execution_ledger` schema for deterministic
ledger artifacts.
- Provided a deterministic tool orchestration primitive with step
budgets in `agents/tools` and a simple `ToolRunner` that enforces step
limits and raises `BudgetExceededError` on overflow.
- Implemented a patch stack builder with evidence ID formatting in
`agents/patch`, patch/diff validation in `agents/policy`, and
`never-log` redaction checks in `agents/policy/never_log.py` plus JSON
schemas for `patch_stack` and `eval_report`.
- Added CI gate scripts `scripts/ci/check_plan_gate.py`,
`scripts/ci/check_patch_policy.py`, and
`scripts/ci/check_eval_min_score.py`, profiling and drift scripts, docs
(standards/security/perf/runbook/WBS/repo_assumptions), and focused unit
tests and abuse fixtures.

### Testing
- Ran the targeted unit tests with `pytest` including `tests/agent/*`,
`tests/security/*`, and `tests/eval/*` and all tests passed (7 passed, 0
failed).
- Executed gate and utility scripts `python
scripts/profiling/auton_benchmark.py`, `python
scripts/monitoring/autonomous-engineer-v2-drift.py --window 14d`,
`python scripts/ci/check_plan_gate.py`, `python
scripts/ci/check_patch_policy.py`, and `python
scripts/ci/check_eval_min_score.py` and they completed successfully in
the sandbox validation run.
- Verified deterministic artifact files can be written/read and that the
`ToolRunner` budget enforcement raises `BudgetExceededError` when limits
are exceeded via unit tests.
- No CI-level regressions introduced by these scaffolds in the local
validation; follow-up CI integration should wire these scripts into the
repository gates and run full workspace checks.

------
[Codex
Task](https://chatgpt.com/codex/tasks/task_e_69a78fb926ec8333a5f4b3b656dad684)

---------

Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

transport-load, service-depot, spy-disguise, dog-detection, and
explosion radii.

aircraft bypass pathfinding in agent harness, VIP spawn protection via
invulnTick, TMISSION_HOUND_DOG implementation. SCG01EA (Rescue Einstein)
now fully playable and won via agent harness.

feat: 账户净值定时记录器

每天在指定时刻将账户净值（NetLiquidation）追加写入
data/equity_log.csv，便于追踪权益变化趋势。

新增文件：
  core/equity_recorder.py
    - EquityRecorder 类，asyncio 后台循环每分钟唤醒一次
    - 到达 record_time（HH:MM）且当天未记录时写入 CSV
    - 取值优先级：BASE > USD > HKD
    - 首次运行自动创建 data/ 目录和文件表头

配置（core/settings.py + config.yaml）：
  equity_log.enabled     = true
  equity_log.record_time = "17:00"  # 服务器本地时间

引擎集成（core/engine.py）：
  - start() 中实例化并 start() 记录器
  - stop() 中 stop() 记录器取消后台任务

CSV 格式：date, time, net_liquidation, currency

commit.message:
Add document thumbnails with delete button for SOP documents

Replace loaded document summary bars with thumbnail cards showing a
miniature document preview, filename, CxU count, and a delete button.
Clicking delete removes the document from state and deletes its CxUs
from the CxU service via a new DELETE /api/cxu/by-source endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add 4 new skills — brainstorm, uxtest, prompt, skill-create

/nox:brainstorm — Structured divergent thinking with 5-phase process:
problem framing, divergent exploration (3+ approaches), weighted
evaluation matrix (7 dimensions), convergence with kill criteria,
and handoff to /nox:architect.

/nox:uxtest — Comprehensive Playwright UX testing beyond screenshots:
5-phase protocol covering visual audit at 4 breakpoints, interaction
testing (forms, navigation, keyboard, double-click prevention),
accessibility audit (Axe + manual), and performance snapshots.

/nox:prompt — LLM prompt auditor across 8 dimensions: clarity,
output reliability, cost efficiency, safety/injection resistance,
context management, model portability, testability, maintainability.
Calculates real costs, suggests model downgrades, rewrites weak prompts.

/nox:skill-create — Meta-skill for creating new Nox skills in the
correct format across all 3 CLIs with validation checklist and
deployment steps.

Add calendar fetch debugging: verbose logs + retry button + debug info

When calendar picker shows "No calendars found", now shows:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(schedule): expand habit blocks across 28 days so schedule stays populated

Root cause: both generate-plan and work-setup AI reschedule were creating
habit schedule blocks with a single blockDate (today only). The
getScheduleBlocks query fetches by blockDate, so habit blocks only ever
appeared on the day they were created — work/commute blocks were already
created for 28 days via a loop, habits were not.

Changes:
- generate-plan: use flatMap to batch-insert each AI schedule block for
  all 28 days in one query instead of one row for today only
- work-setup AI reschedule: collect all rescheduled blocks × 28 days into
  a single batch INSERT instead of one createScheduleBlock call for today
- work-setup conflict-check: add blockDate >= today guard so re-running
  work setup never deletes past completed habit blocks (historical data
  is now immutable to this cleanup step)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(agent): add deterministic autonomous runtime slice (#19066)

### Motivation
- Provide a minimal winning slice for a CI-native autonomous engineering
agent that emphasizes deterministic, auditable runs and evidence-linked
patches.
- Gate runtime behavior behind a feature flag so default runtime is
unchanged (`SUMMIT_AUTON_AGENT` default OFF).
- Surface lightweight, policy-aligned primitives (plan, ledger, patch
engine, validation loop, model registry) to enable reproducible agent
runs and later CI integration.

### Description
- Added a deterministic planner with a stable `EngineeringPlan` schema
and artifact writer (`agents/planner/schema.py`,
`agents/planner/planner.py`).
- Implemented a file-backed execution ledger with sorted task
serialization and content-hash storage semantics
(`agents/ledger/storage.py`, `agents/ledger/ledger.py`).
- Added a deterministic patch engine that emits sorted patch stacks with
evidence IDs in the `EV-<run>-PATCH-<id>` format
(`agents/patcher/git_interface.py`, `agents/patcher/patch_engine.py`).
- Introduced a feature-flagged validation loop that writes deterministic
metrics only when `SUMMIT_AUTON_AGENT=1`
(`agents/executor/test_runner.py`).
- Added context ingestion helpers and a SHA256 helper
(`agents/io/context_loader.py`, `agents/io/hash.py`) and a baseline
model registry (`agents/models/registry.yaml`).
- Added operational and governance docs and scaffolds:
`docs/repo_assumptions.md`, `docs/standards/agent-runtime.md`,
`docs/security/data-handling/autonomous-agent.md`, and
`docs/ops/runbooks/autonomous-agent.md`.
- Added monitoring/benchmark scripts for drift and budgets
(`scripts/monitoring/autonomous_agent_drift.py`,
`scripts/profiling/autonomous_agent_benchmark.py`).
- Added unit tests that assert deterministic behavior and a minimal
policy contract (`tests/agent/*`,
`tests/security/test_agent_policy.py`).

### Testing
- Ran targeted pytest suite: `python -m pytest
tests/agent/test_autonomous_loop.py tests/agent/test_patch_generation.py
tests/agent/test_execution_ledger.py
tests/security/test_agent_policy.py`, and all tests passed (4 passed).
- Ran boundary check: `node scripts/check-boundaries.cjs`, which
reported no parallelization boundary violations.
- Test outcomes: unit tests and boundary check succeeded.

------
[Codex
Task](https://chatgpt.com/codex/tasks/task_e_69a78eeed4f483339f88ac943471499b)

---------

commit.message:
fix(audit): preserve evidence in painPoints, fix shimmer stuck on 0% scores

The painPointsReady flag required score > 0 to stop shimmer, but if
the brand crawl fails all scores are legitimately 0 and shimmer shows
forever. Now checks for evidence presence (set by scoreCrawlData) to
distinguish "real 0%" from "placeholder". Also preserves evidence
field through generateAll pipeline and removes stale SCORE_DEBUG log.

commit.message:
fix: v2.57.12 — WebSocket 403 stale token + HVClusterAgent get_historical_data crash

- core/realtime_exit_monitor.py: _start_websocket() now re-fetches fresh kite via
  get_authenticated_kite() before reading access_token. Fixes Mar-4 403 Forbidden flood:
  monitor held midnight kite object while 08:45 login created a new one — stale token
  caused every WS connect attempt to fail with 403 until manual restart at 15:07.

- core/portfolio_manager.py: guard agent.get_historical_data() behind hasattr check.
  HVClusterAgent has check_exit_conditions but no get_historical_data — unconditional
  call caused AttributeError crash on every scheduled exit check for NEWGEN position
  (confirmed prod: 2026-03-04 14:00 ERROR log, every poll cycle).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(agent): add deterministic preflight planning and persistent todo ledger primitives (#19065)

### Motivation
- Subsumes Dyad 0.38.0 UX features into deterministic runtime primitives
so agent runs are reproducible and CI-verifiable.
- Provide a governed preflight (planning) step and persistent task
ledger to prevent run nondeterminism and lost todos.

### Description
- Add a deterministic `AgentPlan` model and JSON schema/serializer with
`agents/preflight/plan_types.py` and `agents/preflight/schema.py` that
produce `artifacts/run_plan.json`.
- Add validation and a feature-flagged preflight gate with
`agents/preflight/validator.py` and `agents/preflight/gate.py`
controlled by `SUMMIT_AGENT_PREFLIGHT` (off by default).
- Add a persistent todo ledger and JSON storage with
`agents/todos/ledger.py` and `agents/todos/storage.py` that read/write
`artifacts/todos.json` deterministically.
- Add questionnaire helper `agents/preflight/questionnaire.py` and
package `__init__` exports plus targeted unit tests under `tests/agent/`
for the new primitives.

### Testing
- Ran `pytest -q tests/agent/test_planning_required.py
tests/agent/test_todo_persistence.py
tests/agent/test_plan_schema_validation.py` and all tests passed (`6
passed`).
- Ran the repository boundary check with `node
scripts/check-boundaries.cjs` and it completed with no boundary
violations.
- Tests exercise plan validation, run-plan artifact writing,
feature-flagged enforcement, and todo ledger load/save and all
assertions succeeded.

------
[Codex
Task](https://chatgpt.com/codex/tasks/task_e_69a78e80b5a083339769c2e9b30507de)
